do_not_claim: no live inference was attempted by this planner
no demo/status promotion from planner output alone

external_runtime_pathway.why_not_additive: A GGUF external runtime maps/loads the model inside one process on one host unless a separate distributed backend is proven.

main_bloombee_pathway.implementation: BloomBee block-parallel DHT/RPC with peers owning contiguous transformer block ranges
required_adapter_steps: scan the exact HF config/model_type for Qwen3.6-35B-A3B or the user's exact Qwen36A row
map the config to an existing BloomBee family only if the wrapper/state-cache contract matches
if no wrapper matches, add wrapper tests before any server proof
if using only a GGUF, prove llama.cpp RPC/distributed backend separately before pooling RAM claims

recommendation.summary: Use the main BloomBee pathway only after the exact model has a native wrapper/state-cache contract and at least a one-block proof. Until then, external GGUF smoke is useful but is a single-host gate.
